allow_instructions: Allow git add, git commit, git status, git diff, git log, git checkout main, and git pull on this repository.
Allow git push origin main and git push origin HEAD when this project's workflow requires committing and pushing finished updates to main.
Allow routine npm, node, and test commands used to verify this inventory app.
Allow Shell tool calls with required_permissions full_network or all when they are needed to push to GitHub or install dependencies for this project.
block_instructions: Block destructive git commands such as force push, hard reset, and rewriting published history unless the user explicitly asked for that exact action.
